name: save_conversation_summary
description: Saves a summary of the current conversation so you can remember it next time. Call this BEFORE ending every conversation with a 2-3 sentence summary of key topics and insights.

user_id.description: Supabase auth UUID of the user

summary.description: Concise 2-3 sentence summary of this conversation

topics.description: Key topic tags like sun-sign, career, relationships, bazi-pillars
